## Checklist

- [ ] Branch name follows convention (`feat/`, `fix/`, `chore/`, `ci/`, `refactor/`, `docs/` + slug)
- [ ] Commits follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
- [ ] One issue per PR — scope is limited to the linked issue
- [ ] PR description is complete (summary, test plan, linked issue)
- [ ] All required CI checks pass (do not merge with failures)
